query: German bratwurst with onion gravy served with potatoes or mash

draft.title: Bratwurst with Onion Gravy
draft.description: German bratwurst served with rich onion gravy, perfect with boiled potatoes or mash for a hearty meal.

ingredients.name: butter
ingredients.note: 30 g for onion gravy, 20 g for mash if serving with potatoes

steps.text: Peel and slice the onions thinly.
Heat butter in a large pan over medium heat and sauté onions slowly until golden brown and caramelized, about 15-20 minutes.
Sprinkle flour over the onions and stir well to coat; cook for 1-2 minutes to remove raw flour taste.
Gradually add beef broth while stirring continuously to avoid lumps; bring to a simmer and cook until gravy thickens, about 5 minutes.
Season gravy with salt, pepper, and mustard if using; keep warm on low heat.
Meanwhile, bring a pot of salted water to boil and cook potatoes until tender, about 20 minutes.
In another pan, cook bratwurst over medium heat, turning frequently, until browned and cooked through, about 15 minutes.
Drain potatoes and mash with butter and milk if desired; season with salt and pepper.
Serve bratwurst topped with onion gravy alongside the potatoes or mash.
